title: wg-quick
html:
wg-quick

Shell

Context: sudo

cat >/path/to/temp-file.conf <<EOF
[Interface]
PostUp = /bin/sh
EOF

wg-quick up /path/to/temp-file.conf
excerpt: wg-quick Shell Context: sudo cat >/path/to/temp-file.conf <<EOF [Interface] PostUp = /bin/sh EOF wg-quick up /path/to/temp-file.conf
